mapper.select: SELECT r.member_id FROM job_resume jr JOIN resume r ON r.resume_id = jr.resume_id WHERE jr.job_resume_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (member_id, job_resume_id, question_count, interview_type, interviewer_type, interviewer_count, input_mode, use_video, is_completed, started_at, ended_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{jobResumeId}, #{questionCount}, #{interviewType}, #{interviewerType}, #{interviewerCount}, #{inputMode}, #{useVideo}, 1, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO question (session_id, question_text, question_type, source, difficulty, display_order, parent_question_id) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{questionText}, #{questionType}, #{source}, #{difficulty}, #{displayOrder}, #{parentQuestionId})
INSERT INTO answer (question_id, answer_text, answer_order) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{answerText}, #{answerOrder})

INSERT INTO answer_score (answer_id, technical_accuracy_score, logical_structure_score, specificity_score, depth_understanding_score, communication_score, total_score, item_feedback) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{technical}, #{logic}, #{specificity}, #{depth}, #{communication}, #{total}, #{feedback})

INSERT INTO interview_report (session_id, item_score, total_score, overall_comment, strengths, weaknesses, good_answer, improvement_needed, model_answer) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{itemScore}, #{totalScore}, #{overallComment}, #{strengths}, #{weaknesses}, #{goodAnswer}, #{improvementNeeded}, #{modelAnswer})
mapper.select: SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.interview_type AS interviewType, s.question_count AS questionCount, s.started_at AS startedAt, r.total_score AS totalScore, jp.job_category AS jobCategory, ROUND(AVG(sc.technical_accuracy_score)) AS technical, ROUND(AVG(sc.logical_structure_score)) AS logic, ROUND(AVG(sc.specificity_score)) AS specificity, ROUND(AVG(sc.depth_understanding_score)) AS depth, ROUND(AVG(sc.communication_score)) AS communication FROM interview_session s LEFT JOIN interview_report r ON r.session_id = s.session_id LEFT JOIN job_resume jr ON jr.job_resume_id = s.job_resume_id LEFT JOIN job_posting jp ON jp.job_posting_id = jr.job_posting_id LEFT JOIN question q ON q.session_id = s.session_id LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN answer_score sc ON sc.answer_id = a.answer_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY s.session_id, s.interview_type, s.question_count, s.started_at, r.total_score, jp.job_category ORDER BY s.session_id DESC

SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.member_id AS memberId, s.interview_type AS interviewType, s.interviewer_type AS interviewerType, s.question_count AS questionCount, s.use_video AS useVideo, s.input_mode AS inputMode, s.started_at AS startedAt, jp.job_category AS jobCategory FROM interview_session s LEFT JOIN job_resume jr ON jr.job_resume_id = s.job_resume_id LEFT JOIN job_posting jp ON jp.job_posting_id = jr.job_posting_id WHERE s.session_id = #{sessionId} AND s.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT q.question_id AS questionId, q.question_text AS questionText, q.display_order AS displayOrder, q.parent_question_id AS parentQuestionId, a.answer_text AS answerText, sc.technical_accuracy_score AS technical, sc.logical_structure_score AS logic, sc.specificity_score AS specificity, sc.depth_understanding_score AS depth, sc.communication_score AS communication, sc.total_score AS total, sc.item_feedback AS feedback FROM question q LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN answer_score sc ON sc.answer_id = a.answer_id WHERE q.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY q.display_order ASC, q.question_id ASC
SELECT total_score AS totalScore, overall_comment AS overallComment, strengths, weaknesses, improvement_needed AS improvementNeeded FROM interview_report WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sc.technical_accuracy_score)) AS technical, ROUND(AVG(sc.logical_structure_score)) AS logic, ROUND(AVG(sc.specificity_score)) AS specificity, ROUND(AVG(sc.depth_understanding_score)) AS depth, ROUND(AVG(sc.communication_score)) AS communication FROM answer_score sc JOIN answer a ON a.answer_id = sc.answer_id JOIN question q ON q.question_id = a.question_id JOIN interview_session s ON s.session_id = q.session_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT s.session_id AS sessionId, s.started_at AS startedAt, r.total_score AS totalScore FROM interview_session s JOIN interview_report r ON r.session_id = s.session_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY s.session_id ASC
